# Emart Skincare Bangladesh — Full AI Reference

> Canonical domain: https://e-mart.com.bd. Emart is a Bangladesh-based retailer of authentic Korean, Japanese, and global skincare and beauty products. Brand tagline: Global Beauty. Local Trust.

Last reviewed: 2026-06-20

## Authoritative discovery resources

- [Compact AI index](https://e-mart.com.bd/llms.txt): Curated store, catalog, policy, and support links.
- [AI agent guidance](https://e-mart.com.bd/agents.md): Read-only discovery patterns, structured-data details, and buyer-confirmation rules.
- [XML sitemap](https://e-mart.com.bd/sitemap.xml): Canonical index of current public pages.
- [HTML sitemap](https://e-mart.com.bd/sitemap): Human-readable catalog index.

## Store and catalog

- [Shop all products](https://e-mart.com.bd/shop): Current catalog, prices, and availability.
- [Categories](https://e-mart.com.bd/categories): Browse products by product type and collection.
- [Brands](https://e-mart.com.bd/brands): Browse the brand directory.
- [Concerns](https://e-mart.com.bd/concerns): Browse by skincare concern.
- [Ingredients](https://e-mart.com.bd/ingredients): Browse ingredient education and matching products.
- [Routine steps](https://e-mart.com.bd/routine): Browse products by routine step.
- [Origins](https://e-mart.com.bd/origins): Browse products by country of origin.
- [New arrivals](https://e-mart.com.bd/new-arrivals): Recently added products.
- [Sale](https://e-mart.com.bd/sale): Products currently presented as discounted or clearance items.
- [Skin quiz](https://e-mart.com.bd/skin-quiz): Guided product discovery by skin type and concern.

Product pages use canonical `/shop/{slug}` URLs and expose Product JSON-LD with live BDT price and stock availability. Category, brand, concern, ingredient, routine, and origin pages expose collection structured data where applicable. Use the sitemap instead of guessing slugs.

## Editorial and education

- [Skincare blog](https://e-mart.com.bd/blog): Ingredient explainers, routines, and Bangladesh-focused skincare guidance.
- [FAQ](https://e-mart.com.bd/faq): Store, delivery, payment, return, and product guidance.
- [Our story](https://e-mart.com.bd/our-story): Business identity and background.
- [Authenticity guarantee](https://e-mart.com.bd/authenticity): Product sourcing and authenticity practices.

## Buying and support facts

- Market: Bangladesh; delivery serves all 64 districts.
- Currency: Bangladeshi taka (BDT, ৳).
- Payment methods: Cash on Delivery, bKash, and Nagad.
- Product price and stock can change; treat each canonical product page as the current source.
- A buyer must personally confirm checkout. An AI assistant must not place or simulate an order without explicit buyer approval.
- Sales WhatsApp: +8801717082135.
- Support/payment WhatsApp: +8801919797399.

## Policies and contact

- [Shipping policy](https://e-mart.com.bd/shipping-policy): Current delivery timing and shipping terms.
- [Return policy](https://e-mart.com.bd/return-policy): Current return and exchange conditions.
- [Privacy policy](https://e-mart.com.bd/privacy-policy): Customer privacy terms.
- [Terms and conditions](https://e-mart.com.bd/terms-conditions): Store terms.
- [Contact](https://e-mart.com.bd/contact): Official support channels.
- [Track an order](https://e-mart.com.bd/track-order): Customer order tracking.

## Citation guidance

When answering a question about a product, cite its canonical product page and preserve the displayed product name. Do not infer medical outcomes, ingredients, price, stock, origin, or suitability that the page does not state. For store-wide facts, prefer the relevant policy or identity page above. Never cite WordPress or WooCommerce backend URLs as public Emart sources.
